column4:
{{c1::HELLO 看我你在害怕什么}}
{{c2::是我错没能够啊把自己变得成熟}}
{{c3::伤口那么多已经不怕再痛}}
{{c4::没什么转身以后我会练成护体神功}}
column5:
kàn wǒ nǐ zài hài pà shén me
shì wǒ cuò méi néng gòu a bǎ zì jǐ biàn dé chéng shú
shāng kǒu nà me duō yǐ jīng bù pà zài tòng
méi shén me zhuǎn shēn yǐ hòu wǒ huì liàn chéng hù tǐ shén gōng
column6:
Hello, look at me — what are you so afraid of?
It's my fault, I couldn't make myself grow up.
So many wounds already, I'm not afraid of more pain.
It's nothing — once I turn around, I'll master my body-shielding kung fu.

column5:
kàn jiàn zhāng láng wǒ bù pà bù pà la
wǒ shén jīng bǐ jiào dà bù pà bù pà bù pà la
dǎn qiè zhǐ huì ràng zì jǐ gèng qiáo cuì

column6:
I see a cockroach — not scared, not scared!
My nerves are pretty tough — not scared, not scared, not scared!
Being timid only leaves you more worn out.
Going numb to it is its own kind of courage.

column6:
Even sleeping alone — not scared, not scared!
Courage as my quilt — not scared, not scared, not scared!
However dark the night gets, I'll just act like I can't see.
The sun is sure to show up soon.
